carousels.title: Jeremy Cameron bags 10
carousels.blurb: Geelong's first 10-goal game since Ablett Sr in 1994 — seven of them before half-time.

carousels.title: Pendlebury equals the record
carousels.blurb: 432 games — level with the all-time VFL/AFL games record. 21 seasons, one club.

carousels.title: 8 straight — Freo are coming
carousels.blurb: Eight wins on the bounce after a Round 1 loss. The Dockers sit 8-1, conceding a league-best 68 points a game.

carousels.title: Sam Berry's 19-tackle Showdown
carousels.blurb: 19 tackles in Showdown 59 — the second-most in any AFL game ever, one short of the all-time record.

carousels.title: Bailey Smith runs the comp
carousels.blurb: Leading the AFL in disposals for a second straight season at 33.3 a game. The best mid in the game?

carousels.title: Jack Gunston — 34 and still elite
carousels.blurb: 19 goals through Round 6 and 3rd on the Coleman ladder — on pace for a career-best haul at 34.
